training_status: Active daily gym-goer, former competitive snowboarder and runner, serious weight training for about 1 year

benefits.description: Stomach feels like a normal stomach with no pain; significant reduction in gut inflammation and bloating; visible reduction in abdominal distension
Sciatic pain reduced to a faint whisper; back pain significantly improved
When pulling a muscle while lifting weights, it goes away pretty quickly
Feels a bigger spark in energy since incorporating peptides
Improved happiness associated with gut feeling better and increased energy

protocol_notes: Started peptides end of November 2025. Initially started with BPC-157/TB-500, then added KVP, then GHK-CU, 5-amino-1MQ, and sometimes MOTS-C. BPC/TB taken as a blend at 1.5mg daily. 5-amino-1MQ at ~4-5mg/day split into 2 doses. MOTS-C noted as not providing notable energy boost for OP. Before/after photos shown: Dec 20, 2025 vs Jan 29, 2026. No weight loss occurred; changes are attributed to reduced inflammation/bloating. OP noted feeling better even the day after first injection at a med spa.
